TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kari quri utux Sbiyaw balay niqan kingal ka seejiq Truku.Tadaw ka hangan. Niqan kingal jiyax musa tghuy lupung na kiyig alang,gbiyan hari do tgrmagun dmuuy kingal lungaw sinew mmaah sapah, muda siyaw yayung siida, qmita harung utux ni miisug balay ka hiya, mtmring ni mdka saw lhkah ka kana hiyi na,yaasa "Qmita harung utux ka seejiq o mha naqih utux dha,"mnsa ka kari bnhangan na rudan ,asi raraw nhari muda elug isil ka hiya da. Aji biyaw dhuq alang na siida,asi lu qmita kingal saw seejiq duri, gisu mlglug ska bbuyu nimiisug balay ka hiya da,"Rat"msa hmgluq pucing ni lngu msipaq do plealay powsa bag aka utux ni asi lu wada psbu gaing ka pucing na, pklug mniq dalih ka kingal mmanang bi risaw, embahang mjiras msa"waw, waw! Angal ku"msa o ini qtai ga inu,kiya ni embrinah alang musa tmaus rsrisaw ptduuy harung samaw miyah dmayaw miying,wana galiq pqaya qhuni ka qtaan dha, murug galiq nkbbuyu tmabuy bitaq ayug, kiya do hlayan dh aka seejiq kiya,gamksaraw hiy,psnkingal hngak nani wana hhuqil da,kdagun dha dhuq sapah,sdranaan dha do,kla su ha utux swayi bubu na snaw ka miyah smeisug hyaan.
S.PHON: kaɾi quɾi utux sbijaw balaj niqan kiŋal ka səəɟiq tɾuku.tadaw ka ħaŋan. niqan kiŋal ɟijax musa tgħuj lupuŋ na kijig alaŋ,gbijan ħaɾi do tgɾmagun dmuuj kiŋal luŋaw sinəw mmaaħ sapaħ, muda sijaw jajuŋ siida, qmita ħaɾuŋ utux ni miisug balaj ka ħija, mtmɾiŋ ni mdka saw lħkaħ ka kana ħiji na,jaasa "qmita ħaɾuŋ utux ka səəɟiq o mħa naqiħ utux dħa,"mnsa ka kaɾi bnħaŋan na ɾudan ,asi ɾaɾaw nħaɾi muda əlug isil ka ħija da. aɟi bijaw dħuq alaŋ na siida,asi lu qmita kiŋal saw səəɟiq duɾi, gisu mlglug ska bbuju nimiisug balaj ka ħija da,"ɾat"msa ħmgluq puʦiŋ ni lŋu msipaq do pləalaj powsa bag aka utux ni asi lu wada psbu gaiŋ ka puʦiŋ na, pklug mniq daliħ ka kiŋal mmanaŋ bi ɾisaw, əmbaħaŋ mɟiɾas msa"waw, waw! aŋal ku"msa o ini qtai ga inu,kija ni əmbɾinaħ alaŋ musa tmaus ɾsɾisaw ptduuj ħaɾuŋ samaw mijaħ dmajaw mijiŋ,wana galiq pqaja qħuni ka qtaan dħa, muɾug galiq nkbbuju tmabuj bitaq ajug, kija do ħlajan dħ aka səəɟiq kija,gamksaɾaw ħij,psnkiŋal ħŋak nani wana ħħuqil da,kdagun dħa dħuq sapaħ,sdɾanaan dħa do,kla su ħa utux swaji bubu na snaw ka mijaħ sməisug ħjaan.
S.FORM: kari quri utux Sbiyaw balay niqan kingal ka seejiq Truku.Tadaw ka hangan. Niqan kingal jiyax musa tghuy lupung na kiyig alang,gbiyan hari do tgrmagun dmuuy kingal lungaw sinew mmaah sapah, muda siyaw yayung siida, qmita harung utux ni miisug balay ka hiya, mtmring ni mdka saw lhkah ka kana hiyi na,yaasa "Qmita harung utux ka seejiq o mha naqih utux dha,"mnsa ka kari bnhangan na rudan ,asi raraw nhari muda elug isil ka hiya da. Aji biyaw dhuq alang na siida,asi lu qmita kingal saw seejiq duri, gisu mlglug ska bbuyu nimiisug balay ka hiya da,"Rat"msa hmgluq pucing ni lngu msipaq do plealay powsa bag aka utux ni asi lu wada psbu gaing ka pucing na, pklug mniq dalih ka kingal mmanang bi risaw, embahang mjiras msa"waw, waw! Angal ku"msa o ini qtai ga inu,kiya ni embrinah alang musa tmaus rsrisaw ptduuy harung samaw miyah dmayaw miying,wana galiq pqaya qhuni ka qtaan dha, murug galiq nkbbuyu tmabuy bitaq ayug, kiya do hlayan dh aka seejiq kiya,gamksaraw hiy,psnkingal hngak nani wana hhuqil da,kdagun dha dhuq sapah,sdranaan dha do,kla su ha utux swayi bubu na snaw ka miyah smeisug hyaan.
S.PHON: kaɾi quɾi utux sbijaw balaj niqan kiŋal ka səəɟiq tɾuku.tadaw ka ħaŋan. niqan kiŋal ɟijax musa tgħuj lupuŋ na kijig alaŋ,gbijan ħaɾi do tgɾmagun dmuuj kiŋal luŋaw sinəw mmaaħ sapaħ, muda sijaw jajuŋ siida, qmita ħaɾuŋ utux ni miisug balaj ka ħija, mtmɾiŋ ni mdka saw lħkaħ ka kana ħiji na,jaasa "qmita ħaɾuŋ utux ka səəɟiq o mħa naqiħ utux dħa,"mnsa ka kaɾi bnħaŋan na ɾudan ,asi ɾaɾaw nħaɾi muda əlug isil ka ħija da. aɟi bijaw dħuq alaŋ na siida,asi lu qmita kiŋal saw səəɟiq duɾi, gisu mlglug ska bbuju nimiisug balaj ka ħija da,"ɾat"msa ħmgluq puʦiŋ ni lŋu msipaq do pləalaj powsa bag aka utux ni asi lu wada psbu gaiŋ ka puʦiŋ na, pklug mniq daliħ ka kiŋal mmanaŋ bi ɾisaw, əmbaħaŋ mɟiɾas msa"waw, waw! aŋal ku"msa o ini qtai ga inu,kija ni əmbɾinaħ alaŋ musa tmaus ɾsɾisaw ptduuj ħaɾuŋ samaw mijaħ dmajaw mijiŋ,wana galiq pqaja qħuni ka qtaan dħa, muɾug galiq nkbbuju tmabuj bitaq ajug, kija do ħlajan dħ aka səəɟiq kija,gamksaɾaw ħij,psnkiŋal ħŋak nani wana ħħuqil da,kdagun dħa dħuq sapaħ,sdɾanaan dħa do,kla su ħa utux swaji bubu na snaw ka mijaħ sməisug ħjaan.
